'''âdh-j-d-l''' ('''kadhajdeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:makan|makan]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-d-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:makan|makan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-j-d-l
|-
! Lemma
| kadhajdeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thidhajdeloko || jidhajdeloko || shidhajdeloko || kidhajdeloko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthudhajdeloko || jujudhajdeloko || shushudhajdeloko || kukudhajdeloko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thudhajdeloko || judhajdeloko || shudhajdeloko || kudhajdeloko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thudhajdeloko || judhajdeloko || shudhajdeloko || kudhajdeloko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thedhajdeloko || jedhajdeloko || shedhajdeloko || kedhajdeloko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothodhajdeloko || jojodhajdeloko || shoshodhajdeloko || kokodhajdeloko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thodhajdeloko || jodhajdeloko || shodhajdeloko || kodhajdeloko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thodhajdeloko || jodhajdeloko || shodhajdeloko || kodhajdeloko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhajdeloko || dhajdeloko || dhajdeloko || dhajdeloko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhajdeloko || dhajdeloko || dhajdeloko || dhajdeloko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhajdeloko || dhajdeloko || dhajdeloko || dhajdeloko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhajdeloko || dhajdeloko || dhajdeloko || dhajdeloko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thĂŠdhajdeloko || jĂŠdhajdeloko || shĂŠdhajdeloko || kĂŠdhajdeloko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathadhajdeloko || jajadhajdeloko || shashadhajdeloko || kakadhajdeloko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thadhajdeloko || jadhajdeloko || shadhajdeloko || kadhajdeloko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thadhajdeloko || jadhajdeloko || shadhajdeloko || kadhajdeloko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shadhajdelithi || shadhajdeliji || shadhajdelishi || shadhajdeliki
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || shadhajdelĂŠthĂŠ || shadhajdelĂŠjĂŠ || shadhajdelĂŠshĂŠ || shadhajdelĂŠkĂŠ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || shadhajdelatha || shadhajdelaja || shadhajdelasha || shadhajdelaka
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || shadhajdelathaf || shadhajdelajaf || shadhajdelashaf || shadhajdelakaf
|}
